name: Gravy (to Go with Dutch Oven Biscuits)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage in a Dutch oven.
2. Add milk and, while the milk is still cool, mix flour and water thoroughly.
3. Gradually add the mixture to the milk, stirring constantly until it reaches the desired texture.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Serve over biscuits.
